summary: SPK RC 35 sua dut diem worker heartbeat tren SQLite de giao dien native khong con bao worker stale du worker dang chay.
changes: Worker runtime heartbeat tren SPK gio ep tat ca field ve primitive truoc khi ghi SQLite, tranh loi bind lam UI bao 'Worker heartbeat da cu' du worker dang online.
Bo sung test SQLite ghi heartbeat that vao bang worker_runtime_status, mo phong dung runtime native tren Synology Package Center.
Ban nay giu nguyen lifecycle worker inline cua RC34 nhung sua phan status/runtime de giao dien transcode nhan worker online dung cach.
